mapper.select: select * from activityConfig where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER};
mapper.insert: insert into activityConfig (id,type,minLv,maxLv,tag,sort,name,beginTime,endTime,isDelete,custom,state,startRecordTime,endRecordTime,isOpenServer) values ( #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{minLv, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{maxLv, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tag, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{sort, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beginTime, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{endTime, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isDelete, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{custom, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{state, jdbcType=TINYINT},#{startRecordTime, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{endRecordTime, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{isOpenServer, jdbcType=TINYINT} )
mapper.update: update activityConfig set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}, type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, minLv = #{minLv, jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxLv = #{maxLv, jdbcType=INTEGER}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=TINYINT }, sort = #{sort, jdbcType=TINYINT}, beginTime = #{beginTime,jdbcType=BIGINT }, endTime = #{endTime,jdbcType=BIGINT }, isDelete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT }, custom = #{custom,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR }, state = #{state, jdbcType=TINYINT}, startRecordTime = #{startRecordTime,jdbcType=BIGINT }, endRecordTime = #{endRecordTime,jdbcType=BIGINT }, isOpenServer = #{isOpenServer, jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.delete: update activityConfig set isDelete = 1, state = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER};
mapper.update: update activityConfig set isDelete = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER};
